assumptions: The hedged exposure is the variability in future contractual floating-rate interest cash flows of a loan portfolio.
The portfolio is treated as a group of items with shared risk characteristics within IFRS 9 hedge accounting.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: The context directly addresses cash flow hedges of highly probable forecast cash flows, including groups of items and the related OCI and reclassification mechanics.
